knowledge_points.name: 教室物品词汇认读
knowledge_points.description: 识别并正确书写classroom, window, door, picture, light, blackboard等教室常见物品单词。

knowledge_points.name: 询问及描述物品方位
knowledge_points.description: 运用句型Where is it?及其回答It’s near/in/on/under...描述物品位置。

knowledge_points.name: 课堂指令动作执行
knowledge_points.description: 听懂并执行Open the door, Turn on the light等祈使句指令。

knowledge_points.name: 元音字母a在开音节中的发音
knowledge_points.description: 掌握字母a在“辅音+a+辅音+e”结构中发/eɪ/的规律，并能辨析闭音节发音。

knowledge_points.name: 学习用品及书籍词汇
knowledge_points.description: 掌握schoolbag, maths book, English book, storybook等词汇的听说认读。

knowledge_points.name: 询问书包内物品
knowledge_points.description: 熟练运用What’s in your schoolbag?进行问答，并能描述物品颜色。

knowledge_points.name: 元音字母i在开音节中的发音
knowledge_points.description: 辨析字母i在开音节中发/aɪ/与闭音节中发/ɪ/的区别，如like vs big。

knowledge_points.name: 人物外貌与性格描述
knowledge_points.description: 使用tall, strong, friendly, quiet, glasses等词汇描述人物特征。

knowledge_points.name: 询问他人身份与特征
knowledge_points.description: 运用Who's he/she?及He/She has...句型进行人物识别与介绍。

knowledge_points.name: 元音字母o在开音节中的发音
knowledge_points.description: 掌握字母o在o-e结构中发/əʊ/的规律，如nose, note。

knowledge_points.name: 居室名称与家具词汇
knowledge_points.description: 听说认读bedroom, living room, study, kitchen, bathroom及bed, fridge等物品。

knowledge_points.name: 一般疑问句确认位置
knowledge_points.description: 运用Is she in the...? Yes, she is./No, she isn't.询问并确认人或物的位置。

knowledge_points.name: 元音字母u在开音节中的发音
knowledge_points.description: 掌握u-e结构发/juː/的规律，并能区分duck与use的发音差异。

knowledge_points.name: 食物与餐具词汇
knowledge_points.description: 听说认读beef, soup, vegetables及chopsticks, bowl, fork, knife等单词。

knowledge_points.name: 点餐与就餐礼貌表达
knowledge_points.description: 运用What would you like? I'd like...及Help yourself等句型进行情景交际。

knowledge_points.name: 字母e在单词结尾的发音规律
knowledge_points.description: 掌握字母e在me, he, she, we等单词中发长元音/i:/的规律。

knowledge_points.name: 家庭成员与职业名称
knowledge_points.description: 掌握parents, uncle, aunt及doctor, nurse, driver, farmer等职业词汇。

knowledge_points.name: 询问家庭人数与职业
knowledge_points.description: 运用How many people are there...?及What's his/her job?进行信息交流。

knowledge_points.name: 五大元音字母发音综合辨析
knowledge_points.description: 综合区分a, e, i, o, u在开闭音节中的发音规律，能按发音归类单词。
